x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Now Assist for Strategic Portfolio Management requires a dedicated plugin enabling AI-assisted demand scoring and portfolio optimization.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Activate the Now Assist for SPM plugin (sn_spm_gen_ai) via sys_plugins_list.do. Confirm SPM Now Assist entitlement with your ServiceNow account team.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_c203a33acfd903108935fb251d851ccb
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Now Assist for Strategic Portfolio Management requires a dedicated plugin enabling AI-assisted demand scoring and portfolio optimization.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Now Assist SPM Plugin Status</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var checkPlugin = (function checkPlugin(storeScope, pluginSource) {    var result = { found: false, version: "", table: "" };    try {        var saGR = new GlideRecord("sys_store_app");        saGR.addQuery("scope", storeScope);        saGR.setLimit(1);        saGR.query();        if (saGR.next()) {            result.found = true;            result.version = saGR.getValue("version") || "";            result.table = "sys_store_app";            return result;        }    } catch(e1) {}    if (pluginSource) {        try {            var spGR = new GlideRecord("sys_plugins");            spGR.addQuery("source", pluginSource);            spGR.addQuery("active", true);            spGR.setLimit(1);            spGR.query();            if (spGR.next()) {                result.found = true;                result.version = spGR.getValue("version") || "";                result.table = "sys_plugins";                return result;            }        } catch(e2) {}    }    return result;});
    var result = checkPlugin("sn_spm_gen_ai", "sn_spm_gen_ai");
    if (result.found) {
        return {
            status: "ready",
            actualValue: "Now Assist for SPM (" + "sn_spm_gen_ai" + ") installed | version: " + result.version + " | source: " + result.table,
            finding: "Now Assist for SPM is installed. AI-assisted demand scoring and portfolio optimization are available."
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: "not_ready",
            actualValue: "Now Assist for SPM (sn_spm_gen_ai) not found in sys_store_app or sys_plugins",
            finding: "Now Assist for SPM (sn_spm_gen_ai) not found. AI-assisted demand scoring and portfolio optimization are unavailable."
        };
    }
})()]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>SPM</module>
<number>CHK0006092</number>
<order>10</order>
<remediation_guidance>Activate the Now Assist for SPM plugin (sn_spm_gen_ai) via sys_plugins_list.do. Confirm SPM Now Assist entitlement with your ServiceNow account team.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>c203a33acfd903108935fb251d851ccb</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
